data.name: FuzzyLookupControl_Display
data.value: Fuzzy Lookup

data.name: FuzzyLookupControl_Desc
data.value: Drop-in replacement for the standard Lookup control. Uses Dataverse Search (Lucene fuzzy) for typo-tolerant typeahead, shows up to four configurable columns per result, and supports in-place Quick-Create.

data.name: selectedItem_Display
data.value: Selected Record

data.name: selectedItem_Desc
data.value: The bound Lookup column. Target table is taken from the column definition.

data.name: column1_Display
data.value: Column 1 (Primary)

data.name: column1_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the first column shown in the suggestion list. Leave blank to use the target table's primary-name attribute.

data.name: column2_Display
data.value: Column 2

data.name: column2_Desc
data.value: Optional. Logical name of the second column shown in the suggestion list.

data.name: column3_Display
data.value: Column 3

data.name: column3_Desc
data.value: Optional. Logical name of the third column shown in the suggestion list.

data.name: column4_Display
data.value: Column 4

data.name: column4_Desc
data.value: Optional. Logical name of the fourth column shown in the suggestion list.

data.name: pageSize_Display
data.value: Page Size

data.name: pageSize_Desc
data.value: Maximum number of suggestions returned per search. 1 to 50; default 25.

data.name: placeholder_Display
data.value: Placeholder

data.name: placeholder_Desc
data.value: Placeholder text shown in the input when no record is selected.

data.name: additionalFilter_Display
data.value: Additional Filter

data.name: additionalFilter_Desc
data.value: Optional OData filter applied to every search on top of the user's term. Supports tokens replaced at runtime: {record.<column>} for a value on the current form, {user.id} for the current user, {user.bu} for the current user's business unit. If any token can't be resolved (source field empty) the filter is skipped for that search. Example: _msdyn_companyid_value eq {record.sst_company_ref}

data.name: enableQuickCreate_Display
data.value: Enable Quick-Create

data.name: enableQuickCreate_Desc
data.value: When on (default), the dropdown shows a "+ New" button that opens the target table's Quick-Create form. After save the new record is selected automatically.

data.name: enableFavorites_Display
data.value: Enable Favorites

data.name: enableFavorites_Desc
data.value: When on, users can pin frequently used records as favorites. Favorites appear above the search results. Stored per user in browser localStorage; no schema footprint.

data.name: enableRecentlyUsed_Display
data.value: Enable Recently Used

data.name: enableRecentlyUsed_Desc
data.value: When on, the dropdown shows the user's most recently selected records. Stored per user in browser localStorage; no schema footprint.

data.name: previewFormId_Display
data.value: Preview Form ID

data.name: previewFormId_Desc
data.value: Optional GUID of a Quick View Form for the target table. When set, the long-press preview modal renders the fields defined by that form (sections, labels, full values) instead of just the configured columns. Design a Quick View Form for the target table in Power Apps, copy its formid and paste it here. Leave empty for the default preview.
